title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain superior to AI at reliably editing documents because AI struggles with the complex, rule-based structure embedded in formats like .docx files. The talk explains that effective document editing at scale requires treating documents as software programs rather than simple text files, something AI has not yet mastered reliably.
